name: lona-lsp
description: Zero-dependency VS Code language tools for the Lona language.

lona.lsp.queryPath.description: Path to the lona-query semantic engine used for completion, definition, and diagnostics on saved files.

lona.lsp.rootPaths.description: Root paths passed to lona-query. Relative paths are resolved against the first workspace folder. When empty, the current file directory is used.

lona.lsp.preferQueryBackend.description: Prefer lona-query for saved-file completion, definition, and diagnostics within the configured root paths, with automatic fallback to the local parser when unavailable.
